title: T-038 — Allergen cascade engine + fa_allergen_cascade view (NPD-c.2/c.3)
prompt:
# T-038 — Allergen cascade engine + view

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §8.5, §8.6
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Provide cascade rule that on (recipe_components OR ingredient_codes OR prod_detail.process_*) change recomputes fa.allergens (union RM + process) and fa.may_contain (RM may-contain + line history); expose as DB view fa_allergen_cascade, with current overrides applied last.

## Implementation contract
Migration 0042 emits VIEW fa_allergen_cascade joining product, prod_detail, Reference.Allergens_by_RM, Reference.Allergens_added_by_Process, fa_allergen_overrides (current set). Cascade engine module packages/cascade-engine/src/chain-allergens.ts invokes view refresh + emits fa.allergens_changed when set differs from prior product.allergens. updateFaAllergenSet helper writes computed set onto product row.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0042_fa_allergen_cascade.sql [create]
- packages/cascade-engine/src/chain-allergens.ts [create]
- packages/cascade-engine/__tests__/chain-allergens.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given fa with ingredient_codes='RM1939' which Reference.Allergens_by_RM marks confirmed gluten, when cascade runs, then fa.allergens contains 'gluten' and fa_allergen_cascade view returns same
2. Given a process step (operation 'Coat') with Reference.Allergens_added_by_Process row 'soy' confirmed, when cascade runs, then fa.allergens additionally contains 'soy'
3. Given a fa_allergen_overrides row with action='remove' allergen='soy' current, when cascade reads view, then 'soy' is NOT in fa.allergens published set; emits fa.allergens_changed event

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering RM cascade, process addition, override removal
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter cascade-engine test chain-allergens'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass current-overrides chain
- Do not allow cross-tenant joins
- Do not regress cascade perf <200 ms p95

pipeline_inputs.description: Allergen cascade engine + fa_allergen_cascade view producing union(RM, process) minus current overrides.
pipeline_inputs.details: View joins all 4 sources; engine writes computed set to fa.allergens, emits fa.allergens_changed when delta non-empty. Override 'remove' subtracts; 'add' includes.
out_of_scope: Do not implement override modal here (T-040)
Do not implement may-contain line history beyond current allergens row (deferred)
acceptance_criteria: Given fa with ingredient_codes='RM1939' marked confirmed gluten, when cascade runs, then fa.allergens contains 'gluten' and fa_allergen_cascade view returns same
Given operation 'Coat' with Reference.Allergens_added_by_Process row 'soy' confirmed, when cascade runs, then fa.allergens contains 'soy'
Given a fa_allergen_overrides row with action='remove' allergen='soy' current, when cascade reads view, then 'soy' is NOT in fa.allergens published set and fa.allergens_changed is emitted
test_strategy: RED: 3 tests covering RM cascade, process addition, override removal before migration+engine exist
Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter cascade-engine test chain-allergens'
risk_red_lines: Do not regress cascade perf <200 ms p95
